display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: It's the pursuit of cute as the team re-commission a 1991 Nissan Figaro.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The complete story of World War I - from outbreak to conclusion - told through illuminating figures. Hear how an assassination brought conflict to Europe in 1914.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Reigate Fort was repurposed to block the Nazi's from getting to London and was set to become Resistance HQ should the capital have fallen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Leeds Castle near Maidstone, Kent, where they examine a painting of First World War air raids over London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Leeds Castle, Kent, where the treasures uncovered include a cannonball used at the Battle of Trafalgar.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a shine to a rare 1958 Armstrong Siddeley Sapphire with a long family history and a convertible Triumph Herald brings a few smiles on auction day.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewsons auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The complete story of World War I - from outbreak to conclusion - told through illuminating figures. Hear how an assassination brought conflict to Europe in 1914.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Marine life around the world, from dolphins and tusk fish in a tropical coral reef to walruses struggling to cope with the impact of climate change on the polar north.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live in volcanic hot spots on the ocean bed, areas that reach temperatures hot enough to melt lead and which may hold the secrets behind all life on Earth.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Reigate Fort was repurposed to block the Nazi's from getting to London and was set to become Resistance HQ should the capital have fallen.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: It's a battle of little and large as the team get creative with a 1996 Fiat 126 and then run their own consumer test on a 2004 Bentley Continental GT. S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: Actor Andrew Daddo wants the coolest ride on Sydney's Northern Beaches. Dec has other ideas and Andrew is kept in the dark until it's time to reveal the car.

programme.title: A Perfect Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look at how the oceans connect to form the Earth's largest ecosystem, and how its network of currents supports the seas and marine wildlife.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus want to do a 4x4, but their dream list of cars is short as they can't afford much on their budget. However, Will has a plan, and steers them towards a friend's Suzuki SJ. S2 Ep.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole calls in a locksmith to bring a safe back from the scrapheap, and a ship's wheel is left in splinters when the presenter falls out with restorer Guy.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: The reality series that's all at sea with a crew of hardy Scottish trawler fishermen. Join the two greatest skippers of their generation aboard the Fruitful Bough and the Rosebloom.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley uncovers royal papers and explores how the attempt on George III's life by a mentally ill subject changed psychiatry forever.

programme.title: American History's Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley explores how American history has been mythologised and manipulated - beginning with the American Revolution.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on one of their most ambitious projects to date - a 1963 Lotus Elan Series 1. Their second project could also amaze... by showing a profit... a 90's BMW 3 series.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team buy one of Derek's favourite Austin commercials and convert it to electric, and also snap up a super-rare 50's American beach bike.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The story of World War I, told through revealing data. Around 25,000 miles of trenches were cut as the sides dug in and UK factories built 30,000 aircraft a year.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: With the blitz taking its toll, Britain had to keep it's manufacturing going. Shadow factories were born and were crucial in the production of ammunition.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Sage Gateshead, where they examine a phonograph and a tablecloth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces finds from Lanhydrock in Cornwall and Bodnant Garden in north Wales, including a jewellery collection and a rare painting.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Fiat X1/9 / Austin A60 Cambridge: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek sells vehicles from TV show Heartbeat, love for an Austin Cambridge, and a sporty Italian number getting rehomed.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The story of World War I, told through revealing data. Around 25,000 miles of trenches were cut as the sides dug in and UK factories built 30,000 aircraft a year.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, predators with a grasp of communication that has led scientists to conclude they're as intelligent as chimpanzees.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Wildlife that live thousands of kilometres from land, featuring footage of baby turtles using debris as life rafts and sperm whales hunting for squid deep beneath the surface.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: With the blitz taking its toll, Britain had to keep it's manufacturing going. Shadow factories were born and were crucial in the production of ammunition.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher decides that Harris must be put on trial for stealing from another prisoner. You can't trust anyone.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Classic prison-set sitcom with the great Ronnie Barker and a guest appearance from David Jason. Fletch decides to help an old lag who has been in prison for 17 years.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: The immortal prison-set sitcom. When Godber studies to get another O-level before leaving jail, Fletch cannot understand his appetite for all the hard work.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The stories of conservation heroes fighting to save the world's wildlife, from exploring remote jungles to going undercover to disrupt the illegal ivory trade.

programme.title: A Perfect Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look at the effect human activity is having, revealing how the carbon dioxide being produced is destabilising life on Earth.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Improve your knowledge of WWII with this acclaimed series narrated by Laurence Olivier. As the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this epic, 26-part WWII retrospective. Hear how French military leaders made the disastrous mistake of preparing for a war similar to WWI.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: After Dunkirk, Britain faced an onslaught. Although the RAF won the Battle of Britain, our cities were blitzed. Laurence Olivier tells us more in the landmark series on WWII.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Improve your knowledge of WWII with this acclaimed series narrated by Laurence Olivier. As the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this epic, 26-part WWII retrospective. Hear how French military leaders made the disastrous mistake of preparing for a war similar to WWI.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: After Dunkirk, Britain faced an onslaught. Although the RAF won the Battle of Britain, our cities were blitzed. Laurence Olivier tells us more in the landmark series on WWII.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Improve your knowledge of WWII with this acclaimed series narrated by Laurence Olivier. As the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this epic, 26-part WWII retrospective. Hear how French military leaders made the disastrous mistake of preparing for a war similar to WWI.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: After Dunkirk, Britain faced an onslaught. Although the RAF won the Battle of Britain, our cities were blitzed. Laurence Olivier tells us more in the landmark series on WWII.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Improve your knowledge of WWII with this acclaimed series narrated by Laurence Olivier. As the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this epic, 26-part WWII retrospective. Hear how French military leaders made the disastrous mistake of preparing for a war similar to WWI.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: After Dunkirk, Britain faced an onslaught. Although the RAF won the Battle of Britain, our cities were blitzed. Laurence Olivier tells us more in the landmark series on WWII.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Improve your knowledge of WWII with this acclaimed series narrated by Laurence Olivier. As the Nazi war machine sweeps across Europe, an uneasy calm settles on Britain.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this epic, 26-part WWII retrospective. Hear how French military leaders made the disastrous mistake of preparing for a war similar to WWI.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Robin Hood's Bay, a fishing village on the North Yorkshire coast, and reveals tales of smuggling intrigue and bravery.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the third leg of his journey, Simon Reeve is in the United States and travelling down the length of California to explore the land of the giant redwoods and the West Coast.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels through Texas and Mexico and joins the US Border Patrol - who pick up migrants who have illegally crossed the Rio Grande river in search of a new life - on the way.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the fifth and final leg of his journey, Simon travels across Central America from the Caribbean to the Pacific by beginning in Belize and finishing his trip in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the third leg of his journey, Simon Reeve is in the United States and travelling down the length of California to explore the land of the giant redwoods and the West Coast.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels through Texas and Mexico and joins the US Border Patrol - who pick up migrants who have illegally crossed the Rio Grande river in search of a new life - on the way.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the fifth and final leg of his journey, Simon travels across Central America from the Caribbean to the Pacific by beginning in Belize and finishing his trip in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the space comedy! Meet the crew of the Red Dwarf: sole surviving human Lister, hologram Rimmer, and a lifeform evolved from Lister's cat.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Classic space comedy. Having accelerated for a mere three million years, Red Dwarf breaks through the light barrier and sets off a series of weird occurrences.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Interstellar laughs from the Red Dwarf crew. Lister is desperate to see dead officer Kochanski once more and begs Rimmer to bring her back as a hologram.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Off-the-wall space comedy. Holly finds a pod which Rimmer believes to contain the body of a Quagaar warrior, a species with green hair and six breasts.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: More escapades in space on board the Red Dwarf. Lister explores Kochanski's quarters and tries to find her hologram disc - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Space-set comedy. When two Rimmers appear, any thoughts that they might co-exist in harmony are soon put to rest and one of them must be switched off - but which one.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the space comedy! Meet the crew of the Red Dwarf: sole surviving human Lister, hologram Rimmer, and a lifeform evolved from Lister's cat.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Classic space comedy. Having accelerated for a mere three million years, Red Dwarf breaks through the light barrier and sets off a series of weird occurrences.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Interstellar laughs from the Red Dwarf crew. Lister is desperate to see dead officer Kochanski once more and begs Rimmer to bring her back as a hologram.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Off-the-wall space comedy. Holly finds a pod which Rimmer believes to contain the body of a Quagaar warrior, a species with green hair and six breasts.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers melt into Chocolate Week with fiddly mousse cups, a tricky tart and a fab fondue display. Whose fondue will get them through, and whose mousse will cut them loose?

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: It’s Reduce, Reuse, Recycle week, with sewers creating a zero-waste jacket, transforming discarded tents and, inspired by the Make Do and Mend campaign, raiding wardrobes to create new outfits.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi returns to the Kent coast, revisiting the Westward Ho!, where five years ago she came to the rescue of hotelier Jon. She investigates whether he has turned the tide for his seaside hotel.

programme.title: Rich Holiday Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Wealthy friends Lyn and Hugh spend a week in Kent in a static caravan, while office workers Keisha and Merrit stay in Chamonix at a luxury wellness chalet in the shadow of Mont Blanc.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Kevin takes charge! But there are only so many things a man can control, especially when it comes to love. S3 E12

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Attenborough's Wild London
programme.desc: TVNZ celebrates Sir David Attenborough’s 100th birthday with this exploration of the wildlife of his London hometown, from urban deer to rooftop peregrines, revealing how nature thrives in the city.

programme.title: My Impossible House
programme.desc: Season Finale: In Ramsgate, architects Marc and Paula embark on a huge undertaking: transforming a derelict confectionary factory into eight contemporary apartments.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work behind the scenes of a hotel that is built downwards into a quarry, with high-tech guest experiences and rooms with windows looking into aquariums.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George and Fiona’s budding relationship is headline news in Weld. Robbie goes on the offensive to save Fiona. S2 E9

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: Continuing on with the challenge to land the 100 kilo billfish, Scott & Mig head out from Raglan for a last ditch effort to nail their fish.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Delivering milk in sustainable, re-usable containers at Kaipaki Dairies; protecting our flora and fauna from Wilding conifers in Whakatipu; and adding value through research at Torere Macadamias.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A South Canterbury family growing organic blackcurrants has created an international business for products they make from the superfood.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: On Puppy School Police pup Alfa loses his marbles, Corrections pupper Bindi puts in some hard play and with the ski season open trainee LandSAR Avalanche pup Nala takes to the slopes. S4 E3

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa present a back-to-basics masterclass for four favourite dishes that include an aubergine parmigiana schnitzel and Lisa's summer strawberry sponge.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Hong Kong Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy invites best friend and chef Simon Rimmer on a trip down memory lane as he shows him the sights of his old family holidays and tastes of nostalgia.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a man dies in an explosion meant for fledgling starlet Ruth Higgins-Newsome, Murdoch suspects an overzealous fan.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick finds a new adversary in cult leader Bret Stiles, who arouses suspicion when a media mogul who may have questioned his group's activities is found dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with one thing in common - the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Poppy Montgomery stars in the crime drama series. While investigating a murder, Carrie and Al uncover a series of interlocking blackmail schemes.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman is convinced that there is more to the murder of a surf instructor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The launch of Canada's first cooperative to provide homes for working people is disrupted when a young female resident is found dead from an overdose of stolen cocaine.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a man dies in an explosion meant for fledgling starlet Ruth Higgins-Newsome, Murdoch suspects an overzealous fan.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick finds a new adversary in cult leader Bret Stiles, who arouses suspicion when a media mogul who may have questioned his group's activities is found dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with one thing in common - the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Poppy Montgomery stars in the crime drama series. While investigating a murder, Carrie and Al uncover a series of interlocking blackmail schemes.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: When a billionaire is found decapitated, Fitz and Arch find themselves in a classic 'whodunnit', looking for the killer in the victim's family.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman is convinced that there is more to the murder of a surf instructor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A reggae band's reunion concert is blighted when the guitarist is found dead in his dressing room, with a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuth must stop a much-loved institution from going off the rails when the local stationmaster is murdered. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman is convinced that there is more to the murder of a surf instructor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with one thing in common - the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The launch of Canada's first cooperative to provide homes for working people is disrupted when a young female resident is found dead from an overdose of stolen cocaine.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a man dies in an explosion meant for fledgling starlet Ruth Higgins-Newsome, Murdoch suspects an overzealous fan.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a rare humanoid skull is stolen, Murdoch's investigation reveals a few suspects and a dead potential buyer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Murdoch and Choi must intercept a spirited trouble-seeking drunk before his foes find him.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthy's friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set drama, starring Mark Williams.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents investigate the murder of a mathematical genius and discover he was working on a device that could make it possible to hack into any computer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. After an explosion destroys a murder victim's apartment, Carrie's memory of the crime scene leads her and Al to question a prison inmate.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: ..: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. A death in the Saint Marie Heritage Society suggests that this cosy group could be less amicable than it seems.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a rare humanoid skull is stolen, Murdoch's investigation reveals a few suspects and a dead potential buyer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Murdoch and Choi must intercept a spirited trouble-seeking drunk before his foes find him.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents investigate the murder of a mathematical genius and discover he was working on a device that could make it possible to hack into any computer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthy's friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set drama, starring Mark Williams.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. After an explosion destroys a murder victim's apartment, Carrie's memory of the crime scene leads her and Al to question a prison inmate.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: ..: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. A death in the Saint Marie Heritage Society suggests that this cosy group could be less amicable than it seems.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A reggae band's reunion concert is blighted when the guitarist is found dead in his dressing room, with a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A manhunt for two dangerous brothers, whose crimes left long-term scars on a community and a legacy of mistrust for the police, reveals regrets that still haunt Vince.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady Heron is a hit with The Plastics, the A-list girl clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for the ex-boyfriend of alpha Plastic Regina George. Stars Lindsay Lohan. (2004)

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Unbelievable, shocking and uplifting viral videos filmed across the globe. Go behind the lens to hear first hand accounts from the people involved in these once in a lifetime experiences.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A mother thought to be grieving for the loss of her family three years ago becomes a suspect in a CSI investigation. S10 E21

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: As a monster hurricane approaches New York, Bloom and the team scramble to put preparations in place. S4 E22

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Mr Throwback
programme.desc: Season Finale: After a game day from hell, Danny pulls off the impossible and has everyone on his side. S1 E6

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Two farmers meet their love matches before choosing five to return to their farms. All farmers each take one special lady on a 24 hour date and the fallout leads to heartbreak.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the TĀKARO TRIBE on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Remi seizes the day. Sonny surprises John. Mali’s moving on.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides Australia
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides jet off to Sri Lanka. In Nuwara Eliya they’ll travel in a tuk tuk, sample the local cuisine and head to Ramboda Falls. Will our guides love it or loath it?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer tries his hand at making money by photographing celebrities and selling the images to the tabloids. S18 E16

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After Amy ruins one of Sheldon's favourite movies, he gets defensive, seeking revenge. Meanwhile, Leonard discovers a way to get Penny to do anything. S7 E4

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sam and Jay try to replace their broken water heater, but Isaac turns the upgrade into a campaign issue in his bid to represent the basement ghosts. S5 E14

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Cash shows a new recruit the ropes. Mali and Abigail clear the air. Alf’s stubbornness comes at a cost.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Lewis Capaldi bravely hands over his phone in Send to All before performing his number one single Forget Me, and one football fan’s boyhood dream comes true as he unknowingly signs for his team.

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: After a major win at the lab, Les is blindsided by the discovery of an unexpected guest in the dollhouse. Tensions run hot for the Littlejohns with the affair uncovered. S1 E6

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Stefflon Don, Jake Shears and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs face their toughest critic yet when they are challenged to elevate a classic Southern speciality.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Stung by the betrayal of the person who leaked the tape, the once-nurturing Courteney radically transforms into a drill sergeant and calls in the premier choreographer in the country. S1 E7

programme.title: Laid
programme.desc: After Ruby's ex, Richie, confronts her about the sex timeline and his imminent death, she continues looking inward. S1 E4

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: A thrilling new event is unleashed and leaves the Contenders running for their lives. Bradley and Barney host as the gritty Contenders take on the Gladiators for a quarter-final spot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Andy Lee is joined in the studio by Mike Goldstein, Jean Kittson, Hamish Blake and 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: It's the fifth night of the Blind Auditions and artists give it their all, hoping to turn chairs. One braves a Queen classic and a country artist fights for a spot on LeAnn's team.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Bigsies And Littles
programme.desc: Two penguins, Big Blue & Little Blue, explore everyday life with curiosity, kindness, and song, finding big meaning in little moments.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Grace and the son of a prominent theatre critic Frank Bradley get in a fight during a trip to the park, and, to break it up, Fran bops the boy with a baguette. S1 E18

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage's headspace crashes.
